title: wtf is Loop Engineer & how to setup for real
summary: AI Jason explains what Loop Engineer is and provides setup instructions. The video references a GitHub repository with a Loop Engineer template and a workshop on building AI agents, suggesting Loop Engineer is a development tool or framework for AI agent construction.
writeup: AI Jason explains the Loop Engineer framework and walks through setting it up for building AI agents. The relevance is practical: it covers agentic workflows and gives a starting point for implementing AI agents with the framework.
